subcodes.first_line: O summoner to the Kingdom of God! Observe how the bestowals and confirmations of Baha'u'llah have sent thee from America to Germany, that thou mayest cause the fragrances of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی بملکوت الله الطاف و تایید بهاء الله را مشاهده نما که ترا از امریکا
